overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character exploring a vast grassy landscape dotted with ancient stone ruins and towering rock formations under a dramatic golden-purple sky. The character traverses a winding dirt path through tall grass, passing wildlife and approaching massive stone structures.

events.description: character passes underneath the large rock archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass toward a massive natural rock formation

massive natural stone archway spanning across the path ahead
tall ancient stone towers rising in the distant background
dramatic purple and gold cloudy sky
tree with bright yellow autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast field of tall green grass under a dramatic purple-gold sky. A massive natural rock arch dominates the center view ahead, with distant stone towers visible in the background against the colorful clouds.

events.description: group of goats appears grazing on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through tall grass, approaching and passing a small group of goats

notable_agents.action: goats grazing and standing on the dirt path

entered.detail: large boulders scattered among the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the rock arch into more open grassland. Several goats graze near the path as the character approaches and passes them, with yellow-leaved trees and distant stone towers framing the scene.

events.description: text 'Old Palace Ruins' appears on screen indicating the location name

agents.ego_description: walking toward the stone ruins, passing large boulders and golden-leaved trees

entered.detail: massive ancient stone walls and columns of the palace ruins
large rocky outcrops and boulders lining the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads toward massive stone ruin walls. The location text 'Old Palace Ruins' appears as the character approaches the ancient structures, surrounded by golden-leaved trees and large rock formations.

events.description: character approaches two large troll-like enemies resting under a golden tree

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching two massive troll enemies sitting under a golden tree at the ruins entrance

notable_agents.action: large troll-like creature with white fur sitting against a rock
large troll-like creature sitting under the golden tree

entered.detail: distinctive tree with bright golden-yellow leaves shading the area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a golden tree at the ruins entrance where two massive troll-like creatures are resting. The stone walls of the Old Palace Ruins loom closer ahead as the character moves toward the enemies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a vast, colorful grassland that gradually leads toward the imposing entrance of an ancient stone fortress. It begins with the character traversing a field of tall green grass under a dramatic purple-gold sky, moving steadily toward a massive natural rock arch and distant stone towers. As the camera passes beneath the arch, the landscape opens into wider grasslands where grazing goats and yellow-leaved trees frame the path. The scene then shifts toward the looming walls of the Old Palace Ruins, with the environment becoming more enclosed by large rock formations and golden foliage. Finally, the path leads directly to a golden tree at the ruins' entrance, where the camera approaches two resting troll-like creatures beneath the shadow of the massive stone walls.
